overview.description: The Direxion Daily Magnificent 7 Bear 1X ETF (QQQD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Magnificent 7 index. The fund tracks -1x the daily price movements of an equal-weighted index of the seven largest NASDAQ-listed companies. QQQD was launched on Mar 7, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
